description_long: This is a tall, rectangular office building with a dark facade and a regular grid of light gray windows arranged in vertical columns. The structure features a flat roof with a prominent red helipad marking, indicating suitability for helicopter landings. The windows are evenly spaced and rectangular, giving the building a modern, utilitarian appearance. At the base, there are double glass doors serving as the main entrance. The building's exterior is minimalist, with no visible signage or decorative elements. The overall design suggests a contemporary commercial office tower commonly found in urban business districts.
description: A tall, modern office building with a dark facade, grid-like windows, and a red helipad on the roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double glass doors at the base and a regular grid of windows above.
description_view_1: Side view with a similar window grid, but no visible entrance; the helipad marking is partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a uniform window pattern and no entrance; the helipad is visible on the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the same window arrangement and no entrance.
attribute_window_pattern: Uniformly spaced rectangular windows in vertical columns, repeated consistently across all sides.
